name: RAMCOIN
description: $RAM is a Solana-based memecoin that cleverly memes the real-world crisis of Random Access Memory (computer RAM) shortages. Launched in late December 2025 on Pump.fun as a fair-launch token, it humorously links its value to the ongoing global memory crunch driven by exploding demand from AI data centers, high-end gaming PCs, next-gen consoles like PS6 rumors, and massive hardware needs from companies like OpenAI. While most memecoins fade after hype dies, $RAM gets constant fresh fuel from real headlines: Samsung/Micron warnings about shortages through 2027, rising RAM prices, and tech news trends that keep popping up naturally on X. It's not forced utility, just memeing a verifiable macro trend that's already happening and accelerating. Early, community-driven, and riding the wave of actual hardware scarcity
